Off Calendar May-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT & FINANCE INC.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Dismiss Complaint Without Prejudice is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
